body_txt: A town enclosed under a dome. Features often include letting everyone on the outside go to hell, being a paranoid City in a Bottle , and ending up as a Doomed domed hometown . Fairly traditional for Underwater Cities or space colonies in Science Fiction . An Underground City may or may not have one holding up the roof and/or simulating a sky. Sub-Trope of The Wall Around the World . When the entire world lies under a cosmic dome, see Firmament . Not to be confused with a Doomed Hometown , which this trope's name is a snowclone of, though it is possible for them to overlap.
